plugins.name: delegate
plugins.description: Multi-agent orchestration: an orchestrator that only scopes, briefs and synthesizes, with every other action dispatched to context-pure sub-agents. Ships the warden structural pass, the diagnose-first circuit-breaker and the shipshape style canon it depends on.
